title: ATMCA: Augmented Tensorized Consensus Learning for Multi-view Clustering with Anchor-Aligned
authors: Zisen Kong, Pengyuan Li, Dongxia Chang<sup>#</sup>, Yiming Wang, Yao Zhao
description: We propose a novel method to solve the Anchor-Unaligned Problem(AUP).

title: Tensorial Multi-view Clustering via Alternative Rank Minimization and Inter-view Alignment
authors: Zisen Kong, Dongxia Chang<sup>#</sup>, Yiming Wang, Pengyuan Li, Yao Zhao
venue: IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering
description: We propose a new non-convex rank function, and theoretically proved that it is one of the tightest rank substitution functions.

title: Disentangled Contrastive Multi-view Clustering via Semantic Relevance Invariance
authors: Pengyuan Li, Dongxia Chang<sup>#</sup>, Yiming Wang, Zisen Kong, Linhua Kong, Yao Zhao
venue: IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering
description: We propose a decoupled multi-view clustering method based on semantic association invariance to learn unified representations suitable for clustering.

title: Local geometry-enhanced anchor learning for multi-view clustering
authors: Zisen Kong, Zhiqiang Fu, Dongxia Chang<sup>#</sup>, Yiming Wang, Pengyuan Li, Yao Zhao
description: We propose a coarse-to-fine approach for modeling anchor representation learning.

title: Dual-space co-training for large-scale multi-view clustering
authors: Zisen Kong, Zhiqiang Fu, Dongxia Chang<sup>#</sup>, Yiming Wang, Yao Zhao
description: We propose a simple yet effective dual-space collaborative training strategy.
